## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Discern's impressions significantly increased (+29% blog) despite industry-wide drops](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Top performing content: Oklahoma & Washington state pages; LLM referrals diverse](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Refresh strategy: prioritize older "on hold" pages, focus on fact-checking vs. restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Discern hiring 2 salespeople & go-to-market engineer; content strategy on autopilot for now](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [Impressions: Large jump, bucking industry trend of drops](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Clicks: +13% site-wide, +7% blog (modest growth)](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Avg. position: Significant climb](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [CTR: Slight drop (0.1%) due to impression growth outpacing clicks](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Top pages: Oklahoma & Washington state info, franchise tax pages](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### LLM Referrals

  - [Low volume currently, expected to increase](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Diverse page referrals, no clear pattern](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Short-term (past week) vs. long-term (since June) differences](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Scrunch to provide more granular query insights in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [26 pages/week currently refreshed](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [New approach: 5-6 refreshes/week, prioritizing older "on hold" pages](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Focus on fact-checking, updating pricing, deadlines, links](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Maintain current structure for product-linked pages (e.g., franchise tax)](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Balance refreshes with new Nexus page creation](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)

### Discern Business Updates

  - [Hiring 2 salespeople and a go-to-market engineer](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Engineer to focus on list building and outbound email automation](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Content strategy currently on autopilot, performing well](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement new refresh strategy: 5-6 older pages/week, focus on fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Continue monitoring LLM referrals, await Scrunch's detailed query analysis](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Maintain current content production pace, emphasizing Nexus pages](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Revisit content strategy once new hires are onboarded and settled](https://fathom.video/share/QNevFahtScxiTUbqZxYqDpwHgq1kjAKH?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
